column1: Gazing up at the storefronts before you, a deep, strange, mystical feeling comes over you. Surely every one of the windows looking down on the city has a wonderful, lonely story hidden behind it. There are millions of stories here in Lost Wages, but you'll never know any of them. Such is the fate of those who are morally-weak, but financially-strong.
